INDEMNIFICATION. Each party shall indemnify the other from third-party claims arising from its own negligence or willful misconduct. 6. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY. Neither party shall be liable for consequential, indirect or punitive damages. Total liability is limited to fees paid in the prior six months. 7. AUDIT RIGHTS. Client may audit Provider records related to this Agreement upon 30 days written notice, no more than once per year. 8. FORCE MAJEURE. Neither party is liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond reasonable control including acts of God, war, pandemic, or government action. 9. GOVERNING LAW. Delaware law governs this Agreement. Disputes resolved by arbitration in Wilmington, Delaware.

paragraphs.context: COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT This Lease Agreement is between Landlord Properties LLC and Tenant Business Inc. 1. PREMISES. Landlord leases to Tenant the premises at 100 Main Street, Suite 200, comprising 5,000 square feet. 2. TERM. The lease term is three (3) years commencing February 1, 2024 and ending January 31, 2027. 3. RENT. Monthly base rent is $10,000 payable on the first of each month. Rent increases 3% annually. Late payments incur a 5% penalty after 5 days. 4. SECURITY DEPOSIT. Tenant shall deposit two months rent as security, returned within 30 days of lease end less deductions for damages. 5. USE. Premises shall be used only for general office purposes. Tenant shall not alter premises without Landlord written consent. 6. MAINTENANCE. Landlord maintains structure and systems. Tenant maintains interior and is liable for damage caused by Tenant. 7. TERMINATION. Tenant may terminate with 90 days notice and payment of three months rent as early termination fee. Landlord may terminate for nonpayment after 5 days notice or other breach after 30 days notice. 8. RENEWAL. Tenant has one option to renew for two years at market rate with 6 months advance notice. 9. GOVERNING LAW. This Lease is governed by the laws of the state where premises are located.
